mapper.sql: id::text AS id, slug, name, description, protocol, auth_type, endpoint_url, encrypted_credentials, credential_key_version, status, consecutive_failures, last_tested_at, last_initialized_at, last_sync_at, last_error_code, last_error_message, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_mcp_server WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM t_mcp_server WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM t_mcp_server WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_mcp_server ( id, slug, name, description, protocol, auth_type, endpoint_url, encrypted_credentials, credential_key_version, status, consecutive_failures, last_tested_at, last_initialized_at, last_sync_at, last_error_code, last_error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), #{slug}, #{name}, #{description}, #{protocol}, #{authType}, #{endpointUrl}, #{encryptedCredentials}, #{credentialKeyVersion}, #{status}, #{consecutiveFailures}, #{lastTestedAt}, #{lastInitializedAt}, #{lastSyncAt}, #{lastErrorCode}, #{lastErrorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_mcp_server SET slug = #{slug}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, protocol = #{protocol}, auth_type = #{authType}, endpoint_url = #{endpointUrl}, encrypted_credentials = #{encryptedCredentials}, credential_key_version = #{credentialKeyVersion}, status = #{status}, consecutive_failures = #{consecutiveFailures}, last_tested_at = #{lastTestedAt}, last_initialized_at = #{lastInitializedAt}, last_sync_at = #{lastSyncAt}, last_error_code = #{lastErrorCode}, last_error_message = #{lastErrorMessage}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE t_mcp_server SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND deleted_at IS NULL
